summary: The current keyframe shows a long desk with a desktop monitor and tower plus papers and office items, but the keyboard itself and immediate surrounding objects are not clearly visible, so I can’t reliably list the major objects around the keyboard.

payload.answer:
Insufficient evidence: in the provided image, the keyboard itself (and the objects immediately around it) is not clearly visible, so I can’t accurately list the major objects around the keyboard.

What I can see about the overall workstation layout: it’s a long wooden desk against a wall with a monitor centered on the desk, a desktop computer tower on the floor under the desk, a rolling office chair in front, papers and small items scattered across the desk, and a drawer unit/cabinet on the right side (frame 0).
supporting_claims: A long desk against the wall holds a computer monitor, with a desktop tower under the desk (frame 0).
A rolling office chair is positioned in front of the monitor; papers and small items are scattered on the desk; a drawer unit is on the right (frame 0).

uncertainties: Keyboard is not clearly visible in the provided frame, so objects immediately around it (e.g., mouse, notepad, phone) cannot be identified with confidence.
Right-side desk clutter is visible but not detailed enough to confirm item identities near where a keyboard would be.
Only one wide keyframe is available; no close-ups or alternate angles of the keyboard area.

evidence_items.claim: A desktop workstation is present with a monitor on the desk and a computer tower under the desk.
The desk surface has scattered papers and small miscellaneous items, and there is a drawer unit on the right with a chair centered in front of the monitor.

tool_input.request_text: Need closer/alternate views of the desktop surface to clearly see the keyboard and adjacent objects (mouse, papers, devices). Please provide neighboring keyframes and/or a closer view centered on the keyboard area.
